# atlassian_jira_project_role (Resource)

Manages a global Jira Cloud project role definition.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "atlassian_jira_project_role" "example" {
  name        = "Example Role"
  description = "An example project role"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the project role.

### Optional

- `description` (String) The description of the project role.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of the project role.
